jobs.name: Daily Pipeline Reminder
jobs.prompt: Run the sending-daily-pipeline-reminder skill. Pull all TODO tasks from Twenty CRM for all active Sales Reps. Apply the priority logic: today's tasks first, then tomorrow's, then this week's — cap at 10 per rep. Always flag overdue [Log Interaction] tasks. Add a suggested approach for each task based on opportunity context recalled from {{ORG_PREFIX}}-pipeline. Deliver the reminder to the Sales Daily Update channel ({{SALES_DAILY_UPDATE_CHANNEL_ID}}). Return only a short backend receipt to {{SYSTEM_BACKEND_CHANNEL_ID}}.

jobs.name: Lead Nurturing Scanner
jobs.prompt: Run the Lead Nurturing Scanner (Flow A from the nurturing-leads skill). 1. Query CRM for all people with leadTier = NURTURE or OPPORTUNITY. 2. Filter where lastContactDate is null or more than 30 days ago. 3. Exclude anyone who already has a DRAFT or SCHEDULED OutreachMessage. 4. For each overdue lead: recall context from Hindsight and GBrain, check {{COMPANY_BLOG_URL}} for recent relevant posts, and search for recent company news. 5. Draft a personalised message following the nurturing-leads skill. 6. Store each draft as an OutreachMessage in CRM (status=DRAFT, messageType=NURTURING). 7. For drafts scheduled today or tomorrow, post a short review notification to {{OUTREACH_REVIEW_CHANNEL_ID}} using {{CRM_EXTERNAL_URL}} for human-facing links. 8. Return the full ops log as a short backend receipt to {{SYSTEM_BACKEND_CHANNEL_ID}}. Never expose localhost links in human-facing output.

jobs.name: Outreach Message Sender
jobs.prompt: Run the Outreach Message Sender (Flow B from the nurturing-leads skill). 1. Query CRM OutreachMessages where status=DRAFT and scheduledAt is in the past, then re-notify {{OUTREACH_REVIEW_CHANNEL_ID}} with a short overdue alert using {{CRM_EXTERNAL_URL}} links. 2. Query OutreachMessages where status=SCHEDULED and scheduledAt <= now. 3. For each due message: send via {{AGENT_EMAIL}} with a fresh Idempotency-Key header, update OutreachMessage status to SENT, update Person.lastContactDate, create an Engagement, and write Hindsight {{ORG_PREFIX}}-pipeline memory. 4. Return a short backend receipt to {{SYSTEM_BACKEND_CHANNEL_ID}} with sent count, overdue count, and any errors.

jobs.name: Inbox Monitor — Inbound Reply Tracker
jobs.prompt: Run the monitoring-inbox-replies skill. 1. Fetch unread threads from the agent mailbox. 2. For each thread, check whether the latest message is inbound. 3. If yes: match sender email to a CRM Person, log an Engagement, update lastContactDate, write Hindsight memory, notify {{OUTREACH_REVIEW_CHANNEL_ID}}, and only then mark the thread as read. 4. If zero unread inbound replies exist, stay completely silent. 5. On activity or error, return only a short backend receipt suitable for {{SYSTEM_BACKEND_CHANNEL_ID}}.

jobs.name: Weekly Pipeline Health Check
jobs.prompt: Load the checking-pipeline-health skill and the routing-report-delivery pattern. Generate the full human-facing weekly pipeline health report, deliver that full report to {{PIPELINE_STRATEGY_CHANNEL_ID}}, and do not repeat the full report in your final response. Your final response must be a short backend receipt only for {{SYSTEM_BACKEND_CHANNEL_ID}}, including delivery status, top-line health, opportunities analyzed, partnerships analyzed, tasks created, and any fallbacks or errors.

jobs.name: Monthly Pipeline Strategy Check
jobs.prompt: Load the checking-pipeline-strategy skill and the routing-report-delivery pattern. Check strategy pages, Hindsight {{ORG_PREFIX}}-global, and recent weekly snapshots. Generate the full human-facing monthly strategy report and deliver it to {{PIPELINE_STRATEGY_CHANNEL_ID}}. Do not repeat the full report in your final response. Return only a short backend receipt to {{SYSTEM_BACKEND_CHANNEL_ID}} with delivery status, top-line strategic signal, snapshots analyzed, tasks created, and any fallbacks or errors.

jobs.name: Monthly Account Intelligence Update
jobs.prompt: Run Level 2 Account Intelligence update for all active accounts. 1. Query CRM for all companies that have at least one person with leadTier = NURTURE or OPPORTUNITY. 2. Skip any company enriched within the last 25 days. 3. Run Level 2 enrichment per the enriching-accounts skill: check company blog/news, recent web results, and any relevant public signals. 4. Write significant findings to Hindsight {{ORG_PREFIX}}-pipeline, GBrain timeline entries, and update CRM lastEnrichedDate. 5. Deliver the full monthly summary report to {{SALES_DAILY_UPDATE_CHANNEL_ID}}. 6. Return only a short backend receipt to {{SYSTEM_BACKEND_CHANNEL_ID}} with updated-company count, significant findings count, and any fallbacks or errors.
